headline: Get expert help with your tender — end to end.
subhead: Submit your requirements. A dedicated agent picks up your case, coordinates on WhatsApp, and guides you through documents and deadlines — all in one clear workflow.

steps.title: Sign up in minutes
steps.body: Create your account and open a case with a short summary of what you need.

steps.title: Agent picks it up
steps.body: An experienced agent reviews your request, accepts the case, and continues the conversation on WhatsApp.

steps.title: Track every milestone
steps.body: See status, document checklist, and next steps in your dashboard — so nothing slips through the cracks.
